title: GOAL-ORIENTED MOVEMENTS AT THE HUMAN BODY AND SPORT WEAPON SYSTEM
author: Zanevskyy I.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Last decades many thousands of young people became them self as the antropotechnics systems especially with esports games. An aim of the research is to develop a model of goal-oriented movements in the human body and sport weapon system. Methods of mechanical and mathematical modeling allow for a quantitative analysis of sports activities. A mechanical and mathematical model of free oscillations of an arrow (external ballistics) was constructed, which was investigated by the Rayleigh method with successive approximation by the forms of oscillations and taking into account the conditions for the conservation of the amount of motion of a rod with inclusions free from bonds.

keywords: Esports, weapone modeling, kinesiology, computerization, archery, antropotecnics.
